title: Code of Practice for Statistics Method Evidence Pack
research_question: What does the official Code of Practice for Statistics homepage say about the purpose and benefit of the Code?
scope: Controlled real/sandbox method pack using one official public source. This pack tests Evidence Pack v1 workflow structure and traceability. It is not a TWIS article pack.
notes: First controlled real/sandbox Evidence Pack. It uses one official public source and makes only a narrow source-description claim.
